name: Reminders
description: Create, update, list, cancel, and announce local reminders from natural conversation.

capabilities.description: Create a reminder when time and content can be resolved.
Update a scheduled reminder after selecting a clear target.
List scheduled reminders or the next scheduled reminder.
Cancel a scheduled reminder after the target is clear.

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Persist a local reminder with title, remindAt, and optional note.

instructions: Use this skill for reminder, schedule, timer-like follow-up, and reminder management intents. Ask a concise clarification when time or target reminder is ambiguous. Never create or update reminders in the past.
